title: AI-Mise approval receipt
description: Append-only record linking a proposal to a human decision and the resulting applied state. Stored in approval-store/ (control plane) and mirrored to workspace changes/approvals/.

approved_scope_hash.description: SHA-256 over the canonical serialized change set actually approved — detects post-approval swaps.

rejection_reason.description: Feeds rejection learning: a rejected proposal must not recur (policy.self_improvement).

applied.description: Present only after gateway application succeeds.

result_hashes.description: path → SHA-256 after apply; must match proposal after_hash values.
